violations.description: Cleaning and maintenance of floors, walls and ceilings. — --Physical facilities (e.g. floors, walls, ceiling etc…) were not clean or not cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. Dish wash area grout is discolored between sink/wall. Floors need deep cleaned. Floors in prep area have deep cuts. Needs repair
